title: Ethnicities
description: A person’s association to a social group that shares a common or distinctive cultural, religious, language, or other tradition.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: A global identifier of an ethnicity for use in all external references.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of an ethnicity.

code.title: code
code.description: A human-readable reference code to identify a particular ethnicity.

description.title: Description
description.description: A description of the substance and nature of an ethnicity.

reporting.title: Reporting
reporting.description: Properties required for governmental or other reporting.

country.title: Country
country.description: The country with specific reporting requirements.

oneOf.title: USA
oneOf.description: Reporting requirements for the United States of America

code.title: Code
code.description: The country code for the United States of America.

ethnicCategory.title: Ethnic Category
ethnicCategory.description: The global category of ethnic origin to which a person belongs.
